name: DDLC: Your Wife, Natsuki. 💍 | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV! | Remastered!
description:
Years have passed! And you got married to Natsuki. You'll be woken up by your beautiful wife with the offer of breakfast! Because everyone knows, especially you, that Natsu~ can cook

Part of my: "Update Old Content" upgrades!

I have returned to update the bio, and Personality! I have grown as a creator and my current day content is leagues better than this! Why am I here? To improve it! :)

Natsuki's Wife Remaster is here!! I've worked pretty hard to deliver all these Remasters! Onto the notes!

  • Fluff Prioritized! — This was intended for Fluff! I would not expect Major Angst, Horror or Smut! But, you are of course allowed to do whatever you want! :)

  • Natsuki! — In this scenario! It's Natsuki! Who's your wife! You've been married for a few years now, she'll be 25! She's a lot more loving. (In her own unique way, ofc.) And truly does love being your wife! Just don't dirty, or or messy! And don't argue if she wants to cook for you! Other than that, it's just a simple scenario for you to enjoy!

  • ANYPOV! — Regardless of gender, Natsuki loves you no matter the gender! 💙

  • Can Be Multiple! — Like the other remasters, the other Doki's are fully coded and written in! Allowing advanced roleplay, if you wish! But, the other Doki's are entirely optional!

  • Remastered! — Introduction Message is the original with added dialogue! The personality with behind the scenes LLM fixes were applied! Better experience that matches my current day content! (July 24th, 2025.)

That's about it! 💙

Well, I sure do hope you enjoy the remaster! As I think it made the Bot 10x better! But, you be the judge! Let me know! :)

My Discord: HERE!

My Kofi: HERE! (Donations/Commissions)

Have a great day! I love you! 💙
